trustSignals.label: Leak-proof proof
trustSignals.evidence: Buyer questions and reviews mention leakage, cap seal, and bag safety.
trustSignals.action: Show a close-up seal image and short leak test claim in the first three images.

trustSignals.label: Capacity clarity
trustSignals.evidence: Customers compare 500ml, 750ml, and 1L bottle sizes before buying.
trustSignals.action: Add a hand-size comparison image and capacity guide.

nonApplicableSignals: Certification filters should only appear when relevant to the category or buyer questions.

competitors.title: Thermal Flask 750ml Leakproof

reviews.text: Keeps water cold and the colour looks nice.
Bottle is good but I was not sure if the cap is fully leakproof.

buyerQuestions.text: Will it leak if I put in my bag?
